name: empty-state
description: Empty state block with illustration, title, description, and CTA.

props.name: title
props.description: Main heading text displayed in the empty state.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary descriptive text shown below the title.

props.name: icon
props.description: Emoji or text character used as the illustration above the title.

props.name: actionLabel
props.description: Label for the CTA button. Button is only rendered when both actionLabel and onAction are provided.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Callback fired when the CTA button is pressed.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container view.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
// Basic empty list
<EmptyState
  title="No tasks yet"
  description="Tap the button below to create your first task."
  actionLabel="Create task"
  onAction={handleCreate}
/>

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Custom icon, no action
<EmptyState
  icon="🔍"
  title="No results found"
  description="Try adjusting your search terms."
/>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Error state with retry action
<EmptyState
  icon="⚠️"
  title="Failed to load"
  description="Check your internet connection and try again."
  actionLabel="Retry"
  onAction={refetch}
/>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// No notifications placeholder with custom container style
<EmptyState
  icon="🔔"
  title="All caught up"
  description="You have no new notifications."
  containerStyle={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center' }}
/>
